mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Strong labor market conditions, indicated by rising payrolls and declining unemployment, signal elevated corporate earnings growth potential, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint effect of PAYEMS and UNRATE fails to produce positive returns in 60%+ of triggered instances, or the interaction term's coefficient is statistically insignificant (p > 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: Strong consumer demand, reflected in rising industrial production and housing starts, signals sustained economic expansion, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns during late-cycle expansion regimes.
failure_condition: The combined effect of INDPRO and HOUST fails to produce positive returns in 50%+ of cases during late-cycle periods, or the regime-specific coefficient is not significant (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflationary pressures, indicated by rising CPI, signal central bank policy inaction, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as investors price in higher nominal growth.
failure_condition: The correlation between CPIAUCSL and SPX returns falls below 0.15 in 3-year rolling windows, or positive returns occur in < 40% of cases despite rising inflation.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production signals robust supply-side capacity utilization, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as firms benefit from higher output and pricing power.
failure_condition: The INDPRO signal fails to produce positive returns in 60%+ of triggered instances, or the 5-day return distribution shows negative skewness.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of low interest rates and declining unemployment signals accommodative policy and strong labor market dynamics, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The interaction term between FEDFUNDS and UNRATE shows no significant predictive power (p > 0.1), or returns are negative in 50%+ of cases when both conditions are met.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in unemployment signals tightening labor market conditions, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as firms raise wages and prices.
failure_condition: The UNRATE signal fails to produce positive returns in 50%+ of triggered instances, or the 5-day return distribution shows negative skewness.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer spending, indicated by increasing retail sales, signals strong demand for goods and services, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The RSAFS signal fails to produce positive returns in 50%+ of triggered instances, or the 20-day return distribution shows negative skewness.
